title: Remember Me: The Mahalia Jackson Story
original_title: Remember Me: The Mahalia Jackson Story
overview: Follows the successful career of Jackson as well as her unique friendship and devotion to Martin Luther King Jr. and her unsung contribution to the Civil Rights Movement.
